prompt: Create a high-fashion vertical editorial portrait on a tall 9:16 canvas. Show a single glamorous adult female model standing in a confident runway pose against a seamless saturated golden-yellow studio background, lit with warm cinematic sunlight and strong black-and-yellow contrast. She has messy ash-blonde hair, tousled and wind-swept, with strands falling across her face; her face is intentionally obscured by a plain tan square censor block centered over the facial area, with no facial features visible. Outfit: asymmetrical glossy black halter top with a high neck wrap, one shoulder exposed, draped fabric crossing the chest, side cutouts, and one loose off-shoulder sleeve on the left arm; long fitted black opera gloves on both arms; a mustard-yellow ruched wrap mini skirt layered over a black mini skirt; black lace-top thigh-high stocking on one leg; dangling gold chain belt and ring hardware at the hip; long gold geometric chain earring on one ear. Count exactly 1 model, 1 tan face-obscuring square, 1 black asymmetrical halter top, 2 black gloves, 1 yellow wrap skirt, 1 black under-skirt, 1 lace-top thigh-high stocking, 1 gold chain belt, and 1 long gold earring. Emphasize luxury fashion styling, sharp shadows, glossy fabric folds, long legs, dramatic low-angle composition cropped from head to mid-thigh, ultra-detailed fabric texture, editorial magazine aesthetic, realistic yet slightly stylized digital fashion photography. Use the color palette Dortmund-inspired black and golden yellow. No text, logo, watermark, extra people, or background objects.
